overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving through a neon-lit futuristic city at night, stopping at a police crime scene, then proceeding on foot past the Delamain building and into a narrow industrial alleyway. The footage features ray-traced reflections, holographic billboards, and atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane cyberpunk city street with holographic billboards

events.description: vehicle slows down and pulls over near the police cordon

agents.ego_description: driving through the neon-lit city street, approaching a police crime scene

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: large yellow holographic billboard advertising El Dorado
tall dark building with illuminated DELAMAIN signage
wet reflective asphalt with multiple traffic lanes
floating digital billboards and neon building facades

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a first-person perspective from inside a vehicle driving through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. Neon holograms and the El Dorado billboard illuminate the left side while the Delamain building looms on the right. The vehicle slows as it approaches a police scene ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: police crime scene investigation on urban sidewalk

events.description: exits vehicle and begins walking on the sidewalk past the police cordon
passing the crime scene body and yellow police tape

agents.ego_description: walking past the NCPD police car and yellow crime scene tape, observing the investigation area

notable_agents.action: woman in red coat walking past the police car on the sidewalk
NCPD police car parked at the curb with holographic POLICE display active

entered.detail: futuristic police vehicle with glowing blue POLICE text on side
yellow and black striped tape reading POLICE LINE DO NOT CROSS
body lying on the sidewalk near the police car
urban pedestrian walkway with tactile paving strips

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to walking on foot along the sidewalk, passing an active police crime scene. An NCPD police car with holographic displays is parked at the curb next to yellow police tape cordoning off a body on the ground. Pedestrians in futuristic clothing walk past the scene as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza and pedestrian walkway approaching Delamain building

events.description: turning into a more open plaza area with exterior stairs and elevated walkways
approaching the narrow alley entrance with pink road closed barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past the Delamain building, heading toward a plaza and alley entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing standing near the stairs

entered.detail: open paved pedestrian area with modern landscaping
wide staircase leading up to an elevated walkway
pink illuminated barriers with ROAD CLOSED text blocking the alley entrance
partially covered pedestrian passage with overhead structure

segments.scene_description: Continuing past the crime scene, the camera walks through an urban plaza area with the Delamain building still visible on the right. The environment features exterior stairs, digital advertising kiosks, and transitions into a covered walkway. Pink road closed barriers become visible ahead, marking the entrance to a narrow alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial back alley with utility pipes and closed shutters

events.description: passing through the road closed barriers into the narrow enclosed alleyway
lighting becomes significantly darker and more enclosed with industrial neon accents

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow industrial alley, passing dumpsters and exposed utility piping

entered.detail: confined passage between tall industrial buildings with wet reflective floors
exposed utility pipes and conduits running along the alley walls
green industrial waste containers and stacked crates
closed corrugated metal shop fronts with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the pink road closed barriers into a narrow, enclosed industrial alleyway. The environment shifts dramatically from the open neon-lit plaza to a confined space with exposed piping, metal shutters, dumpsters, and dim artificial lighting. The wet concrete reflects the sparse neon lights as the camera moves deeper into the alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a high-speed drive through a neon-lit metropolis into the claustrophobic depths of a dim industrial alley. It begins from within a vehicle gliding past the towering Delamain building and glowing El Dorado holograms before slowing to a halt at a police perimeter. As the perspective shifts to a walking pace, the camera moves past an NCPD crime scene marked by yellow tape and holographic displays, weaving through futuristic pedestrians. The scene then expands into an urban plaza with digital kiosks and exterior stairs before passing through pink road-closed barriers. Finally, the environment shifts dramatically from the open, vibrant plaza into a narrow, enclosed alleyway characterized by exposed piping, metal shutters, and wet concrete reflecting sparse artificial light.
